3129540.name: REYNATIS - Soundtrack
3129540.description: This Soundtrack features six carefully selected tracks from the in-game music of REYNATIS. The collection includes majestic classical pieces themed around magic, tracks inspired by the dim back alleys of Shibuya, and warm melodies reminiscent of magical creatures. Transport yourself to the magical world of REYNATIS with these enchanting and diverse compositions by Yoko Shimomura!
